entries.title: The AI advantage: What top organizations do differently
entries.description:
Our CCO Rob Giglio on what he took away from SXSW – and why the question everyone's asking about AI and creativity has a more interesting answer than you'd expect.

News · Perspectives

entries.title: Introducing Learn Grid: A new home for learning, built for everyone
entries.description:
Learn Grid is Canva's new home for learning, bringing together curriculum-mapped resources, AI-powered activity creation, and lesson delivery in one place, free and open to everyone.

News · Education

entries.title: Canva and Claude for Small Business make campaign creation possible for every small business owner
entries.description:
We’re proud to continue expanding our partnership with Anthropic, integrating the Canva Design Engine into Claude for Small Business, bringing the power of content and campaign creation to small business owners.

News · AI + Product

entries.title: Canva study: AI is in. Now comes the hard part – earning consumer trust
entries.description:
Our latest ‘The State of Marketing & AI Report’ finds that AI is now standard practice for marketing teams. The harder question is whether it's working.

News · Canva for Work

entries.title: Inside our second ‘AI Discovery Week’: What it really takes to build an AI-native workforce
entries.description:
This year, we gave all 5,300 of our team a dedicated week to put the day-to-day down, experiment, and go deep on AI. Here's what we learned about what genuine AI adoption actually looks like.

News · People + Culture

entries.title: Canva expands design creation inside Google Gemini
entries.description:
Our latest integration with Google Gemini builds on recent launches with Claude, ChatGPT, and Microsoft Copilot, bringing design directly into AI workflows.

News · AI + Product

entries.title: What’s New: Our latest launches you won’t want to miss
entries.description:
This month's launches are all about closing the gap between creating and sharing, with sharper AI, smoother workflows, and more ways to publish directly from Canva.

News · AI + Product

entries.title: From AI research to ready-to-use creative: Canva comes to Perplexity Computer
entries.description:
Canva is now Perplexity's only design partner in Perplexity Computer, letting growing businesses turn AI-generated research and insights directly into polished, editable designs, without leaving their workflow.

News · AI + Product

entries.title: Bringing on-brand design creation to AI workflows: Create with Canva inside ChatGPT and Codex
entries.description:
Canva now enables full design creation directly in ChatGPT – generate, edit, and preview designs without leaving the conversation. This follows the earlier launch of our deep research connector, which empowers users to search and summarize existing Canva content inside ChatGPT.

News · AI + Product

entries.title: Make AI images your own: Magic Layers is now inside the world's biggest AI assistants
entries.description:
Magic Layers is now available inside Gemini and ChatGPT, turning AI-generated images into fully editable Canva designs, so the idea you love is also the one you can actually finish.

News · AI + Product

entries.title: The brand infrastructure question every CMO should be asking
entries.description:
As AI enables every team to create more content faster, the companies that stay on brand won't be the ones policing output – they'll be the ones who built brand governance into the system from the start.

A classroom to count on: How we helped rebuild two schools after Typhoon Uwan
entries.description:
After Typhoon Uwan devastated nearly 3,000 schools across the Philippines, the Canva Foundation partnered with nonprofit HOPE to build permanent, storm-resistant classrooms for hundreds of students who had lost their place to learn.

News · Step Two

entries.title: Disney Pixar Toy Story template collection is here
entries.description:
Toy Story 5 is officially in theaters, and together with Disney, we’re celebrating with a free collection of templates spanning all five films, made for every kind of fan.
